title: Jamaican Squash Curry
description: A flavorful and aromatic curry made with roasted squash, Jamaican spices, and fried onions. Serve as a side dish or add to rice or roti for a filling meal.
instructions: 2. Cut the squash in half and scoop out the seeds. Place on a baking sheet and roast for 30 minutes.
3. In a large pan, heat the coconut oil over medium heat. Add the onion, garlic, and ginger and cook until the onion is translucent.
4. Add the curry powder and cook for 1 minute.
5. Add the roasted squash to the pan and stir to combine with the curry powder mixture.
6. Add the fried onions and stir to combine.
7. Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
8. Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve hot.
